# The Look Hair Salon

> Family-owned hair salon in Glendale, CA. Specializing in haircuts, color
> (balayage, highlights, ombré, color correction), styling, extensions, and
> keratin treatments. Open since 11.11.11.

The Look Hair Salon is located at 919 South Central Ave Suite #E,
Glendale, CA 91204. The salon serves men, women, and children with
professional cutting, coloring, and styling services performed by a
team with 25+ years of combined industry experience. Walk-ins are
welcome, and most services can be booked online.

## Booking & contact

- [Book an appointment](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/book): Online
  booking flow — pick service, stylist, and time slot.
- [Contact](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/contact): Address, phone,
  email, hours, and directions.
- [About & team](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/about): Salon
  history and stylist roster.

## Services

- [All services](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/services): Full
  service menu and pricing.
- [Haircuts](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/services/haircuts):
  Men's, women's, and children's cuts.
- [Color & highlights](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/services/color):
  Balayage, ombré, full color, root touch-up, color correction, gloss.
- [Styling](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/services/styling):
  Blowouts, thermal styling, formal updos, extensions, braids.
- [Treatments](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/services/treatments):
  Keratin straightening, deep conditioning, scalp oil, intensive
  repair.
- [Facial services](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/services/facial-services):
  Eyebrow shaping, lip and chin threading or waxing.

## Team & portfolio

- [Meet our team](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/team): Stylist
  profiles with bios and specialties.
- [Gallery](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/gallery): Real
  before/after transformations from our chairs, filterable by
  stylist.

## Reading

- [Blog](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/blog): Hair care tips,
  color trends, styling guides, and salon news.

## Policies

- [Privacy policy](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/terms)
- [Accessibility](https://www.thelookhairsalonla.com/accessibility)
